diagrams.title: Transaction State Diagram
diagrams.description: Five-state model showing lifecycle of a database transaction from active execution to commit or abort
elements: Aborted (rolled back, can restart or terminate)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding transaction lifecycle and recovery paths

diagrams.title: Two-Phase Locking Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline showing growing and shrinking phases of 2PL protocol
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing lock management and understanding why serializability is guaranteed

diagrams.title: Precedence Graph for Serializability Test
diagrams.description: Directed graph used to test if a schedule is conflict serializable
diagrams.purpose: Testing whether concurrent schedule produces correct results

diagrams.title: Lock Compatibility Matrix
diagrams.description: Matrix showing which lock types can be granted together
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multiple transactions access data safely
